title: API 500 Error Spike
alert: Sudden spike in HTTP 500 errors on /api/v1/auth endpoint. Latency has increased from 200ms to 4.5s. Affecting 15% of users globally. Correlates with recent middleware changes.

title: Worker OOM Memory Leak
alert: Background worker service 'billing-processor' is failing with OOM (Out of Memory) kills. Memory usage climbs linearly until crash. Possibly related to new batch processing logic introduced in the last 24 hours.

title: Failed Deploy Rollback
alert: Multiple fatal exceptions detected immediately after deployment v2.4.1. Sentry is showing 'AttributeError' in user profile loading. Requires immediate investigation to determine if rollback is needed or if it is a transient DB issue.
